The linter warning requires replacing `export *` with explicit exports to avoid namespace pollution and improve traceability. The fix involves listing all the necessary exports from the respective modules.

model_patch.entry/src/main/ets/MainAbility/pages/con:
Looking at the code, the linter warning indicates that the `GroupsView` builder function should be converted to a reusable component since it defines complex UI that could be reused. The builder function is used within the `ContactContent` component and contains substantial UI logic.

The fix involves:
1. Creating a new `@Reusable` component `GroupItem` that replaces the `GroupsView` builder
2. Moving the UI logic from the builder to the new component
3. Updating the usage in the parent component to use the new reusable component

```diff
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/MainAbility/pages/contacts/ContactList.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/MainAbility/pages/contacts/ContactList.ets
@@ -1,39 +1,50 @@
+@Reusable
+@Component
+struct GroupItem {
+  @State imageRes: Resource = $r('sys.media.ohos_ic_default')
+  @State title: string | Resource = ''
+  @State showArrow: boolean = false
+
+  aboutToReuse(params: { imageRes: Resource, title: string | Resource, showArrow: boolean }) {
+    this.imageRes = params.imageRes
+    this.title = params.title
+    this.showArrow = params.showArrow
+  }
+
+  build() {
+    Row() {
+      Flex({ direction: FlexDirection.Row, alignItems: ItemAlign.Center, justifyContent: FlexAlign.Start }) {
+        Image(this.imageRes)
+          .width($r("app.float.id_card_image_mid"))
+          .height($r("app.float.id_card_image_mid"))
+          .objectFit(ImageFit.Contain)
+          .margin({ left: $r("app.float.id_card_margin_max"), right: $r("app.float.id_card_margin_xxl") })
+
+        Text(this.title)
+          .fontSize($r("sys.float.ohos_id_text_size_body1"))
+          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
+          .fontColor($r("sys.color.ohos_id_color_text_primary"))
+          .layoutWeight(1)
+          .textAlign(TextAlign.Start)
+
+        if (this.showArrow) {
+          Image($r("app.media.ic_arrow_right_grey"))
+            .width(12)
+            .height($r("app.float.id_card_image_small"))
+            .objectFit(ImageFit.Contain)
+            .margin({ right: $r("app.float.id_card_margin_max") })
+        }
+      }
+    }
+    .width('100%')
+    .height($r("app.float.id_item_height_max"))
+    .backgroundColor(Color.White)
+  }
+}
+
 @Component
 struct ContactContent {
   @Link private presenter: ContactListPresenter;
 
-  @Builder

-    Row() {
-      Flex({ direction: FlexDirection.Row, alignItems: ItemAlign.Center, justifyContent: FlexAlign.Start }) {

-
```

Looking at the code, I can see that the `RecentList` component uses `LazyForEach` inside a `List` component, but the linter warning is specifically about using `LazyForEach` in grids. However, the rule applies to both `Grid` and `List` components when using `LazyForEach`. The issue is that there's no `cachedCount` set on the `List` component, which can impact performance.

The fix is to add a `cachedCount` property to the `List` component to specify how many items should be cached on each side of the currently visible items.

```diff
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/batchselectcontacts/BatchSelectContactsPage.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/batchselectcontacts/BatchSelectContactsPage.ets
@@ -219,6 +219,7 @@
         }, (item:BatchSelectContact) => JSON.stringify(item))
       }
       .width('100%')
+      .cachedCount(1)
       .listDirection(Axis.Vertical)
       .edgeEffect(EdgeEffect.Spring)
     }
```

```diff
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/batchselectcontacts/BatchSelectContactsPage.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/batchselectcontacts/BatchSelectContactsPage.ets
@@ -250,6 +250,7 @@
         .onScrollStop(() => {
           this.isAlphabetClicked = false;
         })
+        .cachedCount(2)
         AlphabetIndexerPage({scroller: this.scroller, presenter: $alphabetIndexPresenter, selected: this.alphabetSelected,
           isClicked: $isAlphabetClicked, drag: $dragList})
           .margin({ top: '10%', bottom: '10%' })
```

model_patch.entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/Contac:
Looking at the code, I can see there's a List component using LazyForEach. According to the linter warning and the provided examples, I need to add a `cachedCount` property to improve performance when using LazyForEach.

```diff
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/ContactList.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/ContactList.ets
@@ -221,7 +221,7 @@ struct ContactContent {
             .width('100%')
             .height('100%')
             .listDirection(Axis.Vertical)
-            .edgeEffect(EdgeEffect.None)
+            .edgeEffect(EdgeEffect.None).cachedCount(2)
             .scrollBar(BarState.Off).onScrollIndex((firstIndex: number, lastIndex: number) => {if (!this.isAlphabetClicked) {

             }}).onScrollStart(() => {this.dragList = true;}).onScrollStop(() => {this.isAlphabetClicked = false;})
```

model_patch.entry/src/main/ets/pages/group/BatchDele:
Looking at the code, I can see that the issue is with the `List` component using `LazyForEach` without setting an appropriate `cachedCount` value. The linter warning suggests setting a `cachedCount` for performance optimization when using `LazyForEach` in scrollable containers.

Here's the fix:

```diff
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/group/BatchDeleteGroup.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/group/BatchDeleteGroup.ets
@@ -210,6 +210,7 @@
           .backgroundColor($r('app.color.skin_background_primary'))
           .listDirection(Axis.Vertical)
           .edgeEffect(EdgeEffect.Spring, { alwaysEnabled: true })
+          .cachedCount(2)
           .scrollBar(BarState.Off)
         }
```

model_patch.entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/search:
Looking at the code, I need to extract the complex component inside the ListItem into a reusable component. The issue is that the current ListItem contains a complex structure with SearchPhotoView and ContactSearchInfo components that could benefit from reuse.

Here's the diff patch:

```diff
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/search/ContactSearch.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/search/ContactSearch.ets
@@ -1,3 +1,62 @@
+@Reusable
+@Component
+struct ContactSearchListItem {
+  @ObjectLink item: any
+  @ObjectLink presenter: any
+  @Local isPC: boolean
+  @Local hasComma: RegExp
+  @Local labelMatch: RegExp
+  @Local COMMA_REPLACE: string = ','
+
+  aboutToReuse(params: {
+    item: any,
+    presenter: any,
+    isPC: boolean,
+    hasComma: RegExp,
+    labelMatch: RegExp
+  }): void {
+    this.item = params.item
+    this.presenter = params.presenter
+    this.isPC = params.isPC
+    this.hasComma = params.hasComma
+    this.labelMatch = params.labelMatch
+  }
+
+  build() {
+    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.BottomEnd }) {
+      Row() {
+        SearchPhotoView({ item: this.item, presenter: this.presenter })
+        Column() {
+          ContactSearchInfo({
+            name: this.item.contact.name.replace(this.hasComma, this.COMMA_REPLACE).split(this.labelMatch),
+            organization: this.item.contact.organization.replace(this.hasComma, this.COMMA_REPLACE).split(this.labelMatch),
+            phoneNumbers: this.item.contact.phoneNumbers,
+            inputKeyword: this.presenter.inputKeyword,
+            positions: this.item.contact.position.replace(this.hasComma, this.COMMA_REPLACE).split(this.labelMatch),
+            emails: this.presenter.processData(this.item.contact.emails),
+            imInfo: this.presenter.processData(this.item.contact.imInfo),
+            familyAddress: this.presenter.processData(this.item.contact.familyAddress),
+            note: this.item.contact.note.replace(this.hasComma, this.COMMA_REPLACE).split(this.labelMatch),
+            nickname: this.item.contact.nickname.replace(this.hasComma, this.COMMA_REPLACE).split(this.labelMatch),
+            nameHasHighlightLabel: this.item.contact.name.includes('em'),
+            organizationRemoveHighlightLabel:
+            this.item.contact.organization.replace(new RegExp('<\/?.+?>', 'g'), ''),
+            positionRemoveHighlightLabel:
+            this.item.contact.position.replace(new RegExp('<\/?.+?>', 'g'), ''),
+            nameIsEmpty: StringUtil.isEmpty(this.item.contact.name)
+          })
+        }
+        .flexShrink(1)
+        .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
+        .margin({
+          start: this.isPC ? LengthMetrics.vp(0) :
+          LengthMetrics.resource($r('app.float.id_card_margin_xxl'))
+          })
+      }
+      .alignItems(VerticalAlign.Center)
+      .width('100%')
+      .constraintSize({
+        minHeight: this.isPC ? $r('app.float.id_item_height_large') :
+        $r('app.float.id_item_height_max')
+      })
+    }
+  }
+}
+
 // ... existing imports and code ...
@@ -550,58 +609,13 @@
               ListItem() {
-                Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.BottomEnd }) {
-                  Row() {
-                    SearchPhotoView({ item: item, presenter: this.presenter })
-                    Column() {
-                      ContactSearchInfo({
-                        name: item.contact.name.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
-                        organization: item.contact.organization.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
-                        phoneNumbers: item.contact.phoneNumbers,
-                        inputKeyword: this.presenter.inputKeyword,
-                        positions: item.contact.position.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
-                        emails: this.presenter.processData(item.contact.emails),
-                        imInfo: this.presenter.processData(item.contact.imInfo),
-                        familyAddress: this.presenter.processData(item.contact.familyAddress),
-                        note: item.contact.note.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
-                        nickname: item.contact.nickname.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
-                        nameHasHighlightLabel: item.contact.name.includes('em'),
-                        organizationRemoveHighlightLabel:
-                        item.contact.organization.replace(new RegExp('<\/?.+?>', 'g'), ''),
-                        positionRemoveHighlightLabel:
-                        item.contact.position.replace(new RegExp('<\/?.+?>', 'g'), ''),
-                        nameIsEmpty: StringUtil.isEmpty(item.contact.name)
-                      })
-                    }
-                    .flexShrink(1)
-                    .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
-                    .margin({
-                      start: this.isPC ? LengthMetrics.vp(0) :
-                      LengthMetrics.resource($r('app.float.id_card_margin_xxl'))
-                      })
-                  }
-                  .alignItems(VerticalAlign.Center)
-                  .width('100%')
-                  .constraintSize({
-                    minHeight: this.isPC ? $r('app.float.id_item_height_large') :
-                    $r('app.float.id_item_height_max')
-                  })
-                }
+                ContactSearchListItem({
+                  item: item,
+                  presenter: this.presenter,
+                  isPC: this.isPC,
+                  hasComma: hasComma,
+                  labelMatch: labelMatch
+                })
               }
```

model_patch.entry/src/main/ets/pages/phone/dialer/Di:
Looking at the code, the warning is triggered because `this.formatSearchNumber(item.phoneNumber)` is a function call being passed as a parameter to `DialerSearchListItem`. According to the rule, we should avoid passing function calls as parameters to reusable components.

The fix is to compute the formatted number in advance and store it in a variable or the item itself, then pass the computed value instead of calling the function directly.

```diff
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/phone/dialer/DialerSearchList.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/phone/dialer/DialerSearchList.ets
@@ -529,7 +529,8 @@
         ListItem() {
           DialerSearchListItem({
             onClickContentCallBack: this.onClickContentCallBack,
-            displayName: item.name,
+            displayName: item.name,
+            phoneNumberWithHighLight: item.phoneNumber,
             markType: item.markType,
             markCustom: item.markContent,
             isCloudMark: item.isCloudMark,
@@ -541,10 +542,11 @@
             dataType: item.dataType,
             curIndex: index,
             selectIndex: this.selectIndex,
             onClickIntoDetailCallBack: this.onClickIntoDetailCallBack,
-            formatNumber: this.formatSearchNumber(item.phoneNumber),
+            formatNumber: item.formattedNumber || this.formatSearchNumber(item.phoneNumber),
             highlight: item.phoneNumber.includes('<em>') ? PhoneNumber.formatDisplayPhoneNumber(
-              this.formatSearchNumber(item.phoneNumber), this.telNumber) : [DEFAULT_INDEX, DEFAULT_INDEX]
+              item.formattedNumber || this.formatSearchNumber(item.phoneNumber), 
+              this.telNumber) : [DEFAULT_INDEX, DEFAULT_INDEX]
           });
         }
```

```diff
+@Reusable

+  private menuDelete?: (pressIndex: number) => void
+  private menuUnPin?: (threadId: number, pressIndex: number) => void
+  private menuPin?: (threadId: number, pressIndex: number) => void
+  private menuReadOrUnRead?: (item: any, countOfUnread: number, telephone: string) => void
+  private onClickListItem?: (item: any, index: number) => void
+
+  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>): void {
+    this.item = params.item as any
+    this.fatherView = params.fatherView as string || 'Conversation'
+    this.isMultipleSelectState = params.isMultipleSelectState as boolean || false
+    this.isInSetReadThreadIndex = params.isInSetReadThreadIndex as number || -1
+    this.isShowHeadIcon = params.isShowHeadIcon as boolean || false
+    this.loadFromDB = params.loadFromDB as boolean || true
+    this.showCount = params.showCount as boolean || false
+    this.inputText = params.inputText as string || ''
+    this.isPad = params.isPad as boolean || false
+    this.curBp = params.curBp
+    this.showCountOfUnread = params.showCountOfUnread as boolean || false
+    this.isShowBottomLine = params.isShowBottomLine as boolean || false
+    this.sessionListHeight = params.sessionListHeight as number || 0
+    this.isNeedReuse = params.isNeedReuse as boolean || false
+    this.backgroundColor = params.backgroundColor as ResourceColor || $r('sys.color.background_primary')
+    this.index = params.index as number || 0
+
+    this.onClickHead = params.onClickHead as (clickPosition: number, event: ClickEvent | undefined) => void
+    this.onClickCheckBox = params.onClickCheckBox as (checkIndex: number, value: boolean) => void
+    this.menuMultSelect = params.menuMultSelect as (pressIndex: number) => void
+    this.menuDelete = params.menuDelete as (pressIndex: number) => void
+    this.menuUnPin = params.menuUnPin as (threadId: number, pressIndex: number) => void
+    this.menuPin = params.menuPin as (threadId: number, pressIndex: number) => void
+    this.menuReadOrUnRead = params.menuReadOrUnRead as (item: any, countOfUnread: number, telephone: string) => void
+    this.onClickListItem = params.onClickListItem as (item: any, index: number) => void
+  }
+
+  build() {
+    Column() {
+      Row() {
+        MmsListItem({
+          item: this.item,
+          fatherView: this.fatherView,
+          isMultipleSelectState: this.isMultipleSelectState,
+          isInSetReadThreadIndex: this.isInSetReadThreadIndex,
+          isShowHeadIcon: this.isShowHeadIcon,
+          loadFromDB: this.loadFromDB,
+          showCount: this.showCount,
+          inputText: this.inputText,
+          onClickHead: (clickPosition: number, event: ClickEvent | undefined) => {
+            this.onClickHead?.(clickPosition, event)
+          },
+          onClickCheckBox: (checkIndex: number, value: boolean) => {
+            this.onClickCheckBox?.(checkIndex, value)
+          },
+          menuMultSelect: (pressIndex: number) => {
+            this.menuMultSelect?.(pressIndex)
+          },
+          menuDelete: (pressIndex: number) => {
+            this.menuDelete?.(pressIndex)
+          },
+          menuUnPin: (threadId: number, pressIndex: number) => {
+            this.menuUnPin?.(threadId, pressIndex)
+          },
+          menuPin: (threadId: number, pressIndex: number) => {
+            this.menuPin?.(threadId, pressIndex)
+          },
+          menuReadOrUnRead: (item: any, countOfUnread: number, telephone: string) => {
+            this.menuReadOrUnRead?.(item, countOfUnread, telephone)
+          },
+          onClickListItem: (index: number) => {
+            this.item.index = index
+            this.onClickListItem?.(this.item, index)
+          },
+          isPad: this.isPad,
+          curBp: this.curBp,
+          showCountOfUnread: this.showCountOfUnread,
+          isShowBottomLine: this.isShowBottomLine,
+        })
+          .reuseId(this.isNeedReuse ? 'conversation_list_item' : undefined)
+      }
+      .alignItems(VerticalAlign.Center)
+      .width('100%')
+      .height(this.sessionListHeight)
+      .accessibilityLevel('no')
+      .parallelGesture(
+        GestureGroup(GestureMode.Exclusive,
+          LongPressGesture({ repeat: false, duration: 500 })
+            .onAction(() => {
+            })
+        ))
+      .onClick((event?: ClickEvent) => {
+        HiLog.i(TAG, `conversation list item click,${this.item.threadId},${this.index}`)
+        this.item.index = this.index
+        this.onClickListItem?.(this.item, this.index)
+      })
+    }
+    .width('100%').height('100%')
+    .backgroundColor(this.backgroundColor)
+  }
+}
```

Looking at the code, the linter warning indicates that the complex component structure within the `ListItem` should be extracted into a reusable component. The warning specifically points to line 134, which is inside the `LazyForEach` where a `Column` with multiple nested components is defined.

+  @State content: string = ''

model_patch.HMRouterLibrary/src/main/ets/router/HMLi:
Looking at the code context, the issue is on line 50 where there's a string using double quotes instead of single quotes. In the provided code snippet, line 50 contains: `HMLogger.d("[HMLifecycle] register lifecycle")`

Here's the fix:

```diff
--- a/HMRouterLibrary/src/main/ets/router/HMLifecycleMgr.ets
+++ b/HMRouterLibrary/src/main/ets/router/HMLifecycleMgr.ets
@@ -47,7 +47,7 @@
         currentLifecycle = new HMLifecycleHandle()
         currentLifecycle.singleton = true
         this.lifecycleMap.set(pageUrl, currentLifecycle)
-        HMLogger.d("[HMLifecycle] register lifecycle")
+        HMLogger.d('[HMLifecycle] register lifecycle')
         await currentLifecycle.getLifecycle(pageUrl, onceLifecycle)
         HMLogger.d("[HMLifecycle] register lifecycle finished")
         return currentLifecycle
```
